SEARCH
Package server.controller

Class OrderController

java.lang.Object
server.controller.OrderController
public class OrderController extends Object
Controller class responsible for managing the entire lifecycle of an Order. Handles creation, retrieval, updates, cancellation, availability checks, and payment processing.

    checkAvailability(Date date, int guests)
    Generates a list of time slots for a specific date and checks availability for each.

    generateUniqueConfirmationCode()
    Generates a unique 4-digit confirmation code by ensuring it doesn't collide with any currently APPROVED order.

    getAvailabilityOptions(Date dateOrder)
    Helper to get all valid 30-minute intervals for a given date based on business hours.

    handelUpdateCheckOut(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles the specific update for checking out (payment and freeing table).

    Main handler for Order-related requests.

    handleCheckAvailability(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Checks if tables are available for the requested time and size.

    Handles the creation of a new order.
    private void
    handleDelete(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Deletes (Cancels) an order and releases the table if currently seated.
    private void
    handleGetAll(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves all orders from the database.
    private void
    handleGetAllBySubscriberId(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves the order history for a subscriber.
    private void
    handleGetByCode(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves an order by its confirmation code, used specifically during checkout/seating.
    private void
    handleGetById(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves a single order by its DB ID.
    private void
    handleGetSubscriberApprovedOrders(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Retrieves all APPROVED orders for a specific subscriber.
    private void
    handleIdentifyAtTerminal(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Handles customer arrival at the terminal.
    private void
    handlePayBill(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Calculates final bill with subscriber discounts and frees the physical table.
    private void
    handleResendConfirmation(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Resends confirmation code (creates a new code) if the customer lost it.
    private void
    handleSendEmail(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Sends an email notification (General usage).
    private void
    handleUpdate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client)
    Updates general order details.

    isSpaceAvailable(Date date, int guests)
    Core algorithm to check if space is available.

    Validation logic to ensure tables can accommodate the sorted list of orders.

      public OrderController()

  • Method Details

    • handle

      public void handle(Request req, ConnectionToClient client, List<ConnectionToClient> clients) throws IOException
      Main handler for Order-related requests. Routes the request to specific methods based on the ActionType.
      Parameters:
      req - The request object.
      client - The specific client connection sending the request.
      clients - List of all connected clients (used for broadcasting updates).
      Throws:
      IOException - If an I/O error occurs.

    • handleGetByCode

      private void handleGetByCode(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Retrieves an order by its confirmation code, used specifically during checkout/seating.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handleGetAll

      private void handleGetAll(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Retrieves all orders from the database.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handleGetSubscriberApprovedOrders

      private void handleGetSubscriberApprovedOrders(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Retrieves all APPROVED orders for a specific subscriber.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handleGetAllBySubscriberId

      private void handleGetAllBySubscriberId(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Retrieves the order history for a subscriber.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handleGetById

      private void handleGetById(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Retrieves a single order by its DB ID.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handleCreate

      private boolean handleCreate(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws IOException, SQLException
      Handles the creation of a new order. Steps: 1. Checks for space availability. 2. Resolves Customer (finds existing or creates new). 3. Generates confirmation code. 4. Saves order and sends email confirmation.
      Throws:
      IOException
      SQLException

    • handleCheckAvailability

      private boolean handleCheckAvailability(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws IOException
      Checks if tables are available for the requested time and size. Returns a list of time slots with availability status.
      Throws:
      IOException

    • checkAvailability

      public List<TimeSlotStatus> checkAvailability(Date date, int guests) throws SQLException, IOException
      Generates a list of time slots for a specific date and checks availability for each.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • getAvailabilityOptions

      private List<String> getAvailabilityOptions(Date dateOrder) throws SQLException, IOException
      Helper to get all valid 30-minute intervals for a given date based on business hours.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • isSpaceAvailable

      private boolean isSpaceAvailable(Date date, int guests) throws SQLException
      Core algorithm to check if space is available. Compares the total tables of a specific size against active orders.
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • isValidOrder

      private boolean isValidOrder(List<Integer> table_list, List<Integer> orders, List<Integer> futerOrder)
      Validation logic to ensure tables can accommodate the sorted list of orders.

      Updates general order details.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

      SQLException
      IOException

      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handleIdentifyAtTerminal

      private void handleIdentifyAtTerminal(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Handles customer arrival at the terminal. Checks 15-min rule and assigns a physical table.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

    • handlePayBill

      private void handlePayBill(Request req, ConnectionToClient client) throws SQLException, IOException
      Calculates final bill with subscriber discounts and frees the physical table.
      Throws:
      SQLException
      IOException

      Generates a unique 4-digit confirmation code by ensuring it doesn't collide with any currently APPROVED order.
